grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Comprehensively covers all mentioned areas with dedicated sections for each

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Provides detailed evidence lists including training certificates, complaints register, SRO appointment letter, and many others

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: Clearly identifies SRO requirement with specific evidence needed including appointment letter and contact details

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: Explicitly covers compliance monitoring procedures, review documentation, and meeting minutes for CQS standard reviews

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Dedicated section on Information Security covering cyber security training, secure communications, and bank detail verification

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Specific File Management section covering file reviews, undertakings register, and file retention policies
